description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, updates apt, installs required packages, runs autogen.sh, configures with --enable-static, builds with make -j4, runs make distcheck -j4, and uploads the resulting build artifact named Linux 64-bit from src/lnav.
